generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab
prefix base: http://example.org/base
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor of MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox of MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder,
    base:desc "Angular position data streamed via MQTT from motor encoder"
]
instance GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder,
    base:desc "Angular position data streamed via MQTT from gearbox encoder"
]
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor,
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) data streamed via MQTT"
]
instance MotorPositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]
instance GearboxPositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position from gearbox encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurement (I_M)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]
instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from motor current and position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]
instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]
instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling (Block Definition Diagram, Internal Block Diagram)",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for asset management of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]
instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of robot motion and friction models",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SysML-based system structural modeling service",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemModelInsight
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyEnhancementInsight
]
instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management via AAS for MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]
instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based streaming of sensor data to digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization service for robot motion and friction models",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized robot control parameters based on identified friction models, reducing inaccuracies up to 30%"
]
instance SystemModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of MABI MAX 100 first axis using SysML BDD and IBD"
]
instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management insights via AAS for MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming insights via MQTT"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of robot motion and friction models for monitoring"
]
instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]
instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]
instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s",
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT; specific time scale not detailed in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, live sensor data via MQTT, Asset Administration Shell for asset management, and dashboard visualization to form a passive digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, using live operational data for continuous model improvement during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs measured data; models account for load, temperature, and time dependencies; uncertainties in friction parameters from analytical and data-driven approaches."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standards applied for system modeling and asset representation"
]
